LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PAUL MCCRICKARD AND PAMELA MCCRICKARD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. SET BY AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON MARCH 22, 2013, THE MOVING PARTY HAS NOT FILED ITS MOVING PAPERS WITH THE COURT. ALTHOUGH THE ORDER SHORTENING TIME REFERS TO A COPY OF THE MOTION ATTACHED TO THE EX PARTE APPLICATION, THE MOTION WAS NOT DEEMED FILED WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Defendant'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PAUL MCCRICKARD AND PAMELA MCCRICKARD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. Set by an Order Shortening Time on March 22, 2013, the moving party has not filed its moving papers with the Court. Although the Order Shortening Time refers to a copy of the motion attached to the ex parte application, the motion was not deemed filed with the Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
